title: Gina Corteselli
compiled_truth: Gina Corteselli is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-14 to 2001-11-19), Gina Corteselli sent 29 and received 106 emails, totalling 135 interactions. Top correspondents: [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (13), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (11), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (10), [Ben Glisan](people/ben-glisan) (8), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (8). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, bill_williams_iii, deleted_items, inbox, prc.
